description.en: Zap an enemy with a small jolt of energy.

to_target.self: you raise a finger and a bright spark leaps toward {target}.
to_target.others: {actor} raises a finger and a bright spark leaps toward {target}.

to_target.self: zvedneš prst a jasná jiskra vyletí směrem k {target}.
to_target.others: {actor} zvedne prst a jasná jiskra vyletí směrem k {target}.
